
#1 [internal] load build definition from Dockerfile

#2 [internal] load metadata for docker.io/library/alpine:3.20

#3 [internal] load .dockerignore

#4 [1/7] FROM docker.io/library/alpine:3.20@sha256:d9e853e87e55526f6b2917df91a2115c36dd7c696a35be12163d44e6e2a4b6bc

#5 [internal] load build context

#6 [3/7] RUN echo "step two done"

#7 [2/7] RUN echo "step one" && echo "more output line 1" && echo "more output line 2"

#8 [5/7] COPY Dockerfile /tmp/Dockerfile

#9 [4/7] RUN apk add --no-cache jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo "step three done"

#10 [6/7] RUN echo "step five done"

#11 [7/7] RUN echo "final step"

#12 naming to docker.io/library/lacon-docker-fixture:latest done
#12 unpacking to docker.io/library/lacon-docker-fixture:latest done
